---
pagetitle: "Research"
---

## Working paper

- <a href="files/Multiproduct-Firms-Refunds-and-Product-Returns.pdf" style="color: inherit;">Multiproduct Firms, Refunds and Product Returns</a> with <a href="https://maartenjanssen.at/" style="color: inherit;">Maarten Janssen</a>


## Work in progress

- <a href="files/Optimal-Search-with-Costly-Returns.pdf" style="color: inherit;">Optimal Search with Costly Returns</a>
